post.description: Validates credentials and returns authentication tokens on success
Generates a new access token using a valid refresh token
Sends an email with the username associated with the provided email address

200.description: Recovery email sent successfully (returns regardless of whether email exists)

post.description: Sends an email with a password reset link to the provided email address

200.description: Recovery email sent successfully (returns regardless of whether email exists)

patch.description: Updates the user password using a valid recovery passcode

400.description: Invalid passcode, password requirements not met, or passcode expired

get.description: Checks if the provided passcode is valid and not expired

post.summary: Send OTP to the provided email
post.description: Generates a one-time passcode and sends it to the specified email address

patch.summary: Confirm OTP for a given email and passcode
patch.description: Validates the OTP passcode for the specified email and returns authentication tokens on success

requestBody.description: Email and passcode for OTP verification

200.description: OTP confirmed successfully, authentication tokens provided

400.description: Invalid email format or missing required fields

parameters.name: scopes
parameters.description: Space separated list of OAuth scopes to pass on to the provider. Common scopes: email, userMetadata, openid

parameters.name: provider
parameters.description: Name of the OAuth provider. Supported providers: google, github, apple

302.description: HTTP Redirect to the OAuth identity provider's authorization URL.

Location.description: URL to which the user agent should redirect (or open in a browser for mobile apps).

200.description: DTO containing an access token and a refresh token.
DTO containing an access token and a refresh token.

post.description: Creates a new user invitation and sends an email with OTP for acceptance. If email sending fails, the invitation is still returned. Check emailSent field and use POST /admin/invitations/:code/reattempt to retry.

201.description: Invitation created. Check emailSent field to verify if email was sent successfully.

post.description: Revoke all active invitations for a specific email and category
Generates a new OTP and re-sends the invitation email

patch.description: Allows authenticated user to change their own password by providing current and new password

400.description: New password does not meet requirements

401.description: Invalid current password or authentication token

post.description: Registers a new user in the system with email, username, password and optional metadata

patch.description: Accept an invitation by providing the code and OTP passcode. Include user data in the payload.

get.summary: List roles assigned to a user

post.summary: Assign a role to a user

accessToken.description: JWT access token to use for request authorization.

refreshToken.description: JWT refresh token to use for obtaining a new access token.
JWT access token to use for request authorization.

email.title: user email
email.description: Recover email login by providing an email that will receive an username

email.title: user email
email.description: Recover email password by providing an email that will receive a password reset link

passcode.title: account reset passcode
passcode.description: Passcode used to reset account password

accessToken.description: JWT access token to use for request authorization.

refreshToken.description: JWT refresh token to use for obtaining a new access token.

category.description: Category of invitation that refers the following table name: user, org...

constraints.title: Payload
constraints.description: payload content that will be passed through another module ir order to complete the invitation. This payload will have necessary info to target module complete the invitation e.g. new password or what ever required info. The object not have any strong type defined on purpose because the target moules will have object different signatures

email.description: Email that the invitation will be sent to

category.description: Category of invitation that refers the following table name: user, org...

constraints.title: Payload
constraints.description: payload content that will be passed through another module ir order to complete the invitation. This payload will have necessary info to target module complete the invitation e.g. new password or what ever required info. The object not have any strong type defined on purpose because the target moules will have object different signatures

emailSent.description: Whether the invitation email was sent successfully

emailError.description: Error message if email sending failed. Use POST /admin/invitations/:code/reattempt to retry.

email.description: Email address to revoke invitations for

category.description: Category of invitations to revoke (implementation-specific, e.g., "user", "admin")

currentPassword.title: Current Password
currentPassword.description: The user current password for verification

newPassword.title: New Password
newPassword.description: The new password to set (minimum 8 characters)

userMetadata.description: User metadata containing additional profile information

total.description: Count of records on current page

payload.title: Payload
payload.description: payload content that will be passed through another module ir order to complete the activation. This payload will have necessary info to target module complete the activation e.g. new password or what ever required info. The object not have any strong type defined on purpose because the target moules will have object different signatures

roleId.description: Role ID to assign to the user
